title: Agarose Gel Separation of Reovirus Particles by sigma1 Content
author: Bernardo Mainou
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.krbcv2n

steps.title: Combine 0
steps.instruction: Combine 0.4 g of agarose with 40 ml of TAE

steps.title: Microwave until agarose is thoroughly melted
steps.instruction: Microwave until agarose is thoroughly melted

steps.title: Add water to replace water lost...
steps.instruction: Add water to replace water lost during boiling up to 40 ml and mix well

steps.title: Pour 35 ml agarose to clean casting rig (7x10 cm)
steps.instruction: Pour 35 ml agarose to clean casting rig (7x10 cm)

steps.title: Mix purified reovirus and loading dye...
steps.instruction: Mix purified reovirus and loading dye 1:1 at 1x1011 particles per well (25 ul max)

steps.title: Stain gel with colloidal blue as directed
steps.instruction: Stain gel with colloidal blue as directed

steps.title: Image gel by on Licor Odyssey Imaging System
steps.instruction: Image gel by on Licor Odyssey Imaging System
